title: Tagine Chicken and Bread
description: A North African-inspired dish featuring chicken cooked in a flavorful tagine sauce served with crusty bread.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through, about 20-25 minutes.
Stir in the diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chicken and sauce over sliced bread, garnished with chopped parsley.
